# NNNN Decision Title

Date: YYYY-MM-DD  
Status: Proposed, accepted, superseded, or rejected  
Owner: Name or role

## Context

Describe the problem, constraint, or opportunity.

## Options Considered

| Option | Pros | Cons |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Option A | Benefit | Cost or risk |
| Option B | Benefit | Cost or risk |

## Decision

State the chosen option in one or two sentences.

## Consequences

- Expected benefit.
- Tradeoff or maintenance cost.
- Follow-up needed.

## Review Date

YYYY-MM-DD or "Review when conditions change."
